/.title: Gizmoo AI - AI Voice Receptionist for Australian Tradies

content.heading: Never miss another call.
content.description: Gizmoo AI answers your phone 24/7, qualifies jobs, and books customers directly into your calendar - built for Australian plumbers, electricians, HVAC technicians, and builders.

widget.label: Hear Our AI in Action
widget.sublabel: Call now - experience Gizmoo AI yourself. No signup required.

content.label: Trusted by 500+ businesses to answer their calls

content.heading: Six things your new receptionist never sleeps on.
content.description: Gizmoo AI is not another phone tree or chatbot. It is a full-time voice receptionist that answers, books, syncs, and follows up - on every call, 24/7.

features.title: Answers Every Call
features.copy: 24/7 instant pickup. No hold music. No voicemail. Every caller gets a friendly, intelligent response within seconds - day or night.

features.title: Books Appointments
features.copy: Real-time scheduling that checks your availability, books slots, sends confirmations, and handles reschedules - all without a human lifting a finger.

features.title: Syncs Your Calendar
features.copy: Seamless integration with Google Calendar, Outlook, Calendly, Acuity, and more. Always accurate, never double-booked, time-zone intelligent.

features.title: Makes Outbound Calls
features.copy: Appointment reminders, follow-ups, confirmations, and re-engagement campaigns. Your AI makes the calls so your team can focus on customers.

features.title: Natural Conversations
features.copy: Advanced voice AI with natural pauses, context awareness, and emotional intelligence. Sounds so human your callers forget it is AI.

features.title: Smart Transfers
features.copy: Knows exactly when to escalate to a human. Takes detailed messages with full context. Nothing ever falls through the cracks.

content.heading: One phone line. Zero missed calls.
content.description: Every inbound call answered instantly. Every appointment booked in real time. Every reminder dialed automatically. Here is what it looks like - live.

sidebar.label: Live Agent View
sidebar.heading: Every call, transcribed.
sidebar.copy: See every conversation, every booking, every outbound dial - with full transcripts and caller sentiment.

content.heading: Built for every business with a phone number.

cases.label: Never miss revenue
cases.title: Stop losing thousands to missed calls.

cases.label: 24/7 Availability
cases.title: Open for business around the clock.

cases.label: Focus on customers
cases.title: Free your team from the phone.

content.heading: Enterprise AI. Simple setup.
content.description: Most businesses are live in under 15 minutes. No IT team required. No new hardware. Just a phone line and a few preferences.

steps.title: Connect Your Number
steps.copy: Forward your existing business line or get a new AI-powered number. 5-minute setup - no hardware, no code.

steps.title: Train Your AI
steps.copy: Tell Gizmoo about your business, services, hours, and booking rules. It learns your tone and brand voice in minutes.

steps.title: Go Live
steps.copy: Start answering calls and booking appointments immediately. Monitor every conversation with real-time analytics.

content.heading: Start free. Scale when ready.
content.description: No credit card required. No contracts. No surprises. Cancel anytime.

plans.name: Starter

plans.name: Enterprise
